titleZh: 从民刑结合角度审视新《公司法》忠实勤勉义务
titleEn: Company Law Fiduciary Duties of Directors and Senior Officers in Civil-Criminal Interaction
abstractZh: 结合公司法与刑法修订，讨论董监高忠实勤勉义务在民事追责、刑事风险与企业合规中的交叉边界。
abstractEn: Explores duty of loyalty and care obligations by combining civil and criminal compliance angles that frequently appear in corporate misconduct disputes.
